TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mifoting == Pipodawan O pifonting no 'Amis a tamdaw iraay ko tosa a kasasirom, o cecay I o riyar a pifoting, o cecay I ono 'alo a pifoting.O itiniay I pasawalian a niyaro' ono riyar a pifonting ko sakakaay,do'edo' sa I ono 'alo a pifoting;o itiniay I sa'etipay a niyaro' mala'ayay ko riyar orasaka ono 'alo a pifoting ko sakakaay.O kasasiroma no riyaran a foting ira ko iso,sanglingling,ngitiwang,sapnon,matatosay,lahakakay,timo(kakahong),potadenas,olangnoriyar,nasnguce, solita ato 'aowang. Itini I ngata no cepo' a niyaro' ora Cawi' ato Makotaay i saka 4 folad tahira I saka 5 folad to mihecahecaan o pipodawan.cowa ka difak a koma'en to podaw ko itiniay a tamdaw, ano ira ko 'osaw nipaliwalan tayni i misatokayay, pacaycipin hananay rahidayay ko pipaliwal. Mikakahong Itini to i lilis no riyar a kasaniyaro' i saka 3 folad tahira i saka 5 folad to mihecahecaan, nikakahongay, marorayay ko tayal no mikakahongay,herek no lafi pacomod to tamina i riyar misalafii a misalil,makamanihar ko romi'ad minokay.tahira to I lawac no riyar pacakat han ko tamina I lawac no riyar,militemoh ko fafahiyan midama a mitengteng to salil,mipadang a pasadak to foting.Tangsolan a misalilam ko nikakahongan no mifotingay.Ora mifotingan a kakahong tangsolen a mitokad a miala ko tinai', sakapahen a misawsaw ta teli han I pitapayan masaromi'ad misalafii a mitapay (mihodhod). O pitapay to kakahong masasiromaromaay ko kaloloma' a pitayal, o roma a loma' o tolak no tefos ko sapitapay,o matiniay a nitapayan tadafangsisay, tadaka'eso' a kaenen. O heci no kakahong no pasawalian ko'epeday,ko'engelay a kaenen, cowa ka hitira tono Fotod a kakahong ko'sit awa ko ka'eso' a ka'enen. O kasasiromaroma no pifoting O kasasiromaroma a pifoting no 'Amis a tamdaw tosaay ko kasirom, o cecay i ono riyaran a pifoting, oroma i, ono 'aloan a pifoting: Riyaran a pifoting O itiniay i pasawalian a niyaro' a tamdaw sahetoay o riyar ato 'alo ko pifotingan. Ano iriyar a mifoting mikarilicay to 'aol a tamina itiya ho,anini sato ono soko ko sapisanga' to tamina'. Cowa ka tata'ang koninian a tamina, orasak, cecay ano ca tosa ko mikalicay a tamdaw, itini i ngataay a riyar ko pifotingan no matiniay, papacem a ratal a palowad dadaya minokay. Ona sapifoting a tamina o 'aol ko sapisanga' o tipay ano ca o dadangoyan hananay ko nini. O pakadadangoyananay a pifoting hananay konini. Ona tipay o 'aol ira ko 15cm ko ka tata'ang 3 laya' ko kakaya' a 'aol madeng ira ko 8 ko 'aol ko sapisanga', hifalaten a misilsil ko 4 a 'aol, i fafa'ed nonini telien koya 8 a kakaya'ay a 'aol, o oway ko sapifalod a mikedec pakaketing, isifo' no ifafa'ed nona tipay paketingen ko tanektekay a kamaro'an, halokamaro'an no mifotingay,i kawanan ato I kawili ira ko sa'iwas, paifaloco'ay sa a pacikay, talorikor, pasikawanan, pasikawili a mi'iwas,o cafay a mifoting itira I ka'ayaw no tipay a tomireng a mifolesak to salil. Ira ko pinapina a pifotingan. 1. Misalil Itiraay I sakasepat folad tahira I saka 7,8 folad ko pifotingan.toninian folad away ko fali maradacay ko riyar, naikoran no faliyos ko 'adihayay ko foting.Malacefangay ko pifoting nonini, mamo'etep ko tamdaw ko cecay a cefang, tengtengen no 'alomanay a tamdaw ko salil a midefong talariyar, ma'osaw ko papinapina a tamdaw i lawac no riyar mitatoy to salil, cifoting sato i,tengtengen to talahekal. 2.Mitenengay I ngata no lawac no riyar o fakeloh ko sapipatomenek to salil,maherek to i,terengen ko salil talalawac no riyar a mipasiket I fokeloh,macelak to ko salil I riyariyaran,maleno sato i, mahawikid no riyar ko ko foting alakafikafit sa I salil,makerah sato I, tado han to a miala koni a foting.O pinangang no matiniay a pifoting I, kalafian mitengen to salil to cika a papacem miala to mikafitay a foting. == pacefaday tilid ==
S.PHON: == mifo~utiŇč == pipo~u…¨~…ģawan o~u pifo~untiŇč no~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw iraaj ko~u to~usa a kasasiro~um, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj i o~u rijar a pifo~utiŇč, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj i o~uno~u °a…ĺo~u a pifo~utiŇč.o~u itiniaj i pasawa…ĺian a nijaro~u ° o~uno~u rijar a pifo~untiŇč ko~u sakakaaj,…¨~…ģo~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u ° sa i o~uno~u °a…ĺo~u a pifo~utiŇč;o~u itiniaj i sa °…ôtipaj a nijaro~u ° ma…ĺa °ajaj ko~u rijar o~urasaka o~uno~u °a…ĺo~u a pifo~utiŇč ko~u sakakaaj.o~u kasasiro~uma no~u rijaran a fo~utiŇč ira ko~u iso~u,saŇč…ĺiŇč…ĺiŇč,ŇčitiwaŇč,sapno~un,matato~usaj,…ĺańßakakaj,timo~u(kakańßo~uŇč),po~uta…¨~…ģ…ônas,o~u…ĺaŇčno~urijar,nasŇčo~u~u ¶…ô, so~u…ĺita ato~u °ao~uwaŇč. itini i Ňčata no~u ¶…ôpo~u ° a nijaro~u ° o~ura ¶awi ° ato~u mako~utaaj i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ tańßira i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan o~u pipo~u…¨~…ģawan. ¶o~uwa ka …¨~…ģifak a ko~uma °…ôn to~u po~u…¨~…ģaw ko~u itiniaj a tam…¨~…ģaw, ano~u ira ko~u °o~usaw nipa…ĺiwa…ĺan tajni i misato~ukajaj, pa ¶aj ¶ipin ńßananaj rańßi…¨~…ģajaj ko~u pipa…ĺiwa…ĺ. mikakańßo~uŇč itini to~u i …ĺi…ĺis no~u rijar a kasanijaro~u ° i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ tańßira i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan, nikakańßo~uŇčaj, maro~urajaj ko~u taja…ĺ no~u mikakańßo~uŇčaj,ńß…ôr…ôk no~u …ĺafi pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u tamina i rijar misa…ĺafii a misa…ĺi…ĺ,makamanińßar ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mino~ukaj.tańßira to~u i …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar pa ¶akat ńßan ko~u tamina i …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar,mi…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u fafańßijan mi…¨~…ģama a mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ,mipa…¨~…ģaŇč a pasa…¨~…ģak to~u fo~utiŇč.taŇčso~u…ĺan a misa…ĺi…ĺam ko~u nikakańßo~uŇčan no~u mifo~utiŇčaj.o~ura mifo~utiŇčan a kakańßo~uŇč taŇčso~u…ĺ…ôn a mito~uka…¨~…ģ a mia…ĺa ko~u tinai °, sakapańß…ôn a misawsaw ta t…ô…ĺi ńßan i pitapajan masaro~umi °a…¨~…ģ misa…ĺafii a mitapaj (mińßo~u…¨~…ģńßo~u…¨~…ģ). o~u pitapaj to~u kakańßo~uŇč masasiro~umaro~umaaj ko~u ka…ĺo~u…ĺo~uma ° a pitaja…ĺ, o~u ro~uma a …ĺo~uma ° o~u to~u…ĺak no~u t…ôfo~us ko~u sapitapaj,o~u matiniaj a nitapajan ta…¨~…ģafaŇčsisaj, ta…¨~…ģaka °…ôso~u ° a ka…ôn…ôn. o~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u kakańßo~uŇč no~u pasawa…ĺian ko~u °…ôp…ô…¨~…ģaj,ko~u °…ôŇč…ô…ĺaj a ka…ôn…ôn, ¶o~uwa ka ńßitira to~uno~u fo~uto~u…¨~…ģ a kakańßo~uŇč ko~u °sit awa ko~u ka °…ôso~u ° a ka °…ôn…ôn. o~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u pifo~utiŇč o~u kasasiro~umaro~uma a pifo~utiŇč no~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw to~usaaj ko~u kasiro~um, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj i o~uno~u rijaran a pifo~utiŇč, o~uro~uma i, o~uno~u °a…ĺo~uan a pifo~utiŇč: rijaran a pifo~utiŇč o~u itiniaj i pasawa…ĺian a nijaro~u ° a tam…¨~…ģaw sańß…ôto~uaj o~u rijar ato~u °a…ĺo~u ko~u pifo~utiŇčan. ano~u irijar a mifo~utiŇč mikari…ĺi ¶aj to~u °ao~u…ĺ a tamina itija ńßo~u,anini sato~u o~uno~u so~uko~u ko~u sapisaŇča ° to~u tamina °. ¶o~uwa ka tata °aŇč ko~uninian a tamina, o~urasak, ¶…ô ¶aj ano~u ¶a to~usa ko~u mika…ĺi ¶aj a tam…¨~…ģaw, itini i Ňčataaj a rijar ko~u pifo~utiŇčan no~u matiniaj, papa ¶…ôm a rata…ĺ a pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja mino~ukaj. o~una sapifo~utiŇč a tamina o~u °ao~u…ĺ ko~u sapisaŇča ° o~u tipaj ano~u ¶a o~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan ńßananaj ko~u nini. o~u paka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujananaj a pifo~utiŇč ńßananaj ko~unini. o~una tipaj o~u °ao~u…ĺ ira ko~u ** ¶m ko~u ka tata °aŇč * …ĺaja ° ko~u kakaja ° a °ao~u…ĺ ma…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ira ko~u * ko~u °ao~u…ĺ ko~u sapisaŇča °, ńßifa…ĺat…ôn a misi…ĺsi…ĺ ko~u * a °ao~u…ĺ, i fafa °…ô…¨~…ģ no~unini t…ô…ĺi…ôn ko~uja * a kakaja °aj a °ao~u…ĺ, o~u o~uwaj ko~u sapifa…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ a mik…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶ pakak…ôtiŇč, isifo~u ° no~u ifafa °…ô…¨~…ģ no~una tipaj pak…ôtiŇč…ôn ko~u tan…ôkt…ôkaj a kamaro~u °an, ńßa…ĺo~ukamaro~u °an no~u mifo~utiŇčaj,i kawanan ato~u i kawi…ĺi ira ko~u sa °iwas, paifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj sa a pa ¶ikaj, ta…ĺo~uriko~ur, pasikawanan, pasikawi…ĺi a mi °iwas,o~u ¶afaj a mifo~utiŇč itira i ka °ajaw no~u tipaj a to~umir…ôŇč a mifo~u…ĺ…ôsak to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ. ira ko~u pinapina a pifo~utiŇčan. *. misa…ĺi…ĺ itiraaj i sakas…ôpat fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ tańßira i saka *,* fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u pifo~utiŇčan.to~uninian fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ awaj ko~u fa…ĺi mara…¨~…ģa ¶aj ko~u rijar, naiko~uran no~u fa…ĺijo~us ko~u °a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u fo~utiŇč.ma…ĺa ¶…ôfaŇčaj ko~u pifo~utiŇč no~unini, mamo~u °…ôt…ôp ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a ¶…ôfaŇč, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ôn no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u sa…ĺi…ĺ a mi…¨~…ģ…ôfo~uŇč ta…ĺarijar, ma °o~usaw ko~u papinapina a tam…¨~…ģaw i …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar mitato~uj to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ, ¶ifo~utiŇč sato~u i,t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ôn to~u ta…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ. *.mit…ôn…ôŇčaj i Ňčata no~u …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar o~u fak…ô…ĺo~uńß ko~u sapipato~um…ôn…ôk to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ,mańß…ôr…ôk to~u i,t…ôr…ôŇč…ôn ko~u sa…ĺi…ĺ ta…ĺa…ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar a mipasik…ôt i fo~uk…ô…ĺo~uńß,ma ¶…ô…ĺak to~u ko~u sa…ĺi…ĺ i rijarijaran,ma…ĺ…ôno~u sato~u i, mańßawiki…¨~…ģ no~u rijar ko~u ko~u fo~utiŇč a…ĺakafikafit sa i sa…ĺi…ĺ,mak…ôrańß sato~u i, ta…¨~…ģo~u ńßan to~u a mia…ĺa ko~uni a fo~utiŇč.o~u pinaŇčaŇč no~u matiniaj a pifo~utiŇč i, ka…ĺafian mit…ôŇč…ôn to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ to~u ¶ika a papa ¶…ôm mia…ĺa to~u mikafitaj a fo~utiŇč. == pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ==
S.FORM: == Mifoting == Pipodawan O pifonting no 'Amis a tamdaw iraay ko tosa a kasasirom, o cecay I o riyar a pifoting, o cecay I ono 'alo a pifoting.O itiniay I pasawalian a niyaro' ono riyar a pifonting ko sakakaay,do'edo' sa I ono 'alo a pifoting;o itiniay I sa'etipay a niyaro' mala'ayay ko riyar orasaka ono 'alo a pifoting ko sakakaay.O kasasiroma no riyaran a foting ira ko iso,sanglingling,ngitiwang,sapnon,matatosay,lahakakay,timo(kakahong),potadenas,olangnoriyar,nasnguce, solita ato 'aowang. Itini I ngata no cepo' a niyaro' ora Cawi' ato Makotaay i saka 4 folad tahira I saka 5 folad to mihecahecaan o pipodawan.cowa ka difak a koma'en to podaw ko itiniay a tamdaw, ano ira ko 'osaw nipaliwalan tayni i misatokayay, pacaycipin hananay rahidayay ko pipaliwal. Mikakahong Itini to i lilis no riyar a kasaniyaro' i saka 3 folad tahira i saka 5 folad to mihecahecaan, nikakahongay, marorayay ko tayal no mikakahongay,herek no lafi pacomod to tamina i riyar misalafii a misalil,makamanihar ko romi'ad minokay.tahira to I lawac no riyar pacakat han ko tamina I lawac no riyar,militemoh ko fafahiyan midama a mitengteng to salil,mipadang a pasadak to foting.Tangsolan a misalilam ko nikakahongan no mifotingay.Ora mifotingan a kakahong tangsolen a mitokad a miala ko tinai', sakapahen a misawsaw ta teli han I pitapayan masaromi'ad misalafii a mitapay (mihodhod). O pitapay to kakahong masasiromaromaay ko kaloloma' a pitayal, o roma a loma' o tolak no tefos ko sapitapay,o matiniay a nitapayan tadafangsisay, tadaka'eso' a kaenen. O heci no kakahong no pasawalian ko'epeday,ko'engelay a kaenen, cowa ka hitira tono Fotod a kakahong ko'sit awa ko ka'eso' a ka'enen. O kasasiromaroma no pifoting O kasasiromaroma a pifoting no 'Amis a tamdaw tosaay ko kasirom, o cecay i ono riyaran a pifoting, oroma i, ono 'aloan a pifoting: Riyaran a pifoting O itiniay i pasawalian a niyaro' a tamdaw sahetoay o riyar ato 'alo ko pifotingan. Ano iriyar a mifoting mikarilicay to 'aol a tamina itiya ho,anini sato ono soko ko sapisanga' to tamina'. Cowa ka tata'ang koninian a tamina, orasak, cecay ano ca tosa ko mikalicay a tamdaw, itini i ngataay a riyar ko pifotingan no matiniay, papacem a ratal a palowad dadaya minokay. Ona sapifoting a tamina o 'aol ko sapisanga' o tipay ano ca o dadangoyan hananay ko nini. O pakadadangoyananay a pifoting hananay konini. Ona tipay o 'aol ira ko 15cm ko ka tata'ang 3 laya' ko kakaya' a 'aol madeng ira ko 8 ko 'aol ko sapisanga', hifalaten a misilsil ko 4 a 'aol, i fafa'ed nonini telien koya 8 a kakaya'ay a 'aol, o oway ko sapifalod a mikedec pakaketing, isifo' no ifafa'ed nona tipay paketingen ko tanektekay a kamaro'an, halokamaro'an no mifotingay,i kawanan ato I kawili ira ko sa'iwas, paifaloco'ay sa a pacikay, talorikor, pasikawanan, pasikawili a mi'iwas,o cafay a mifoting itira I ka'ayaw no tipay a tomireng a mifolesak to salil. Ira ko pinapina a pifotingan. 1. Misalil Itiraay I sakasepat folad tahira I saka 7,8 folad ko pifotingan.toninian folad away ko fali maradacay ko riyar, naikoran no faliyos ko 'adihayay ko foting.Malacefangay ko pifoting nonini, mamo'etep ko tamdaw ko cecay a cefang, tengtengen no 'alomanay a tamdaw ko salil a midefong talariyar, ma'osaw ko papinapina a tamdaw i lawac no riyar mitatoy to salil, cifoting sato i,tengtengen to talahekal. 2.Mitenengay I ngata no lawac no riyar o fakeloh ko sapipatomenek to salil,maherek to i,terengen ko salil talalawac no riyar a mipasiket I fokeloh,macelak to ko salil I riyariyaran,maleno sato i, mahawikid no riyar ko ko foting alakafikafit sa I salil,makerah sato I, tado han to a miala koni a foting.O pinangang no matiniay a pifoting I, kalafian mitengen to salil to cika a papacem miala to mikafitay a foting. == pacefaday tilid ==

itiniaj i pasawa…ĺian a nijaro~u ° o~uno~u rijar a pifo~untiŇč ko~u sakakaaj,…¨~…ģo~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u ° sa i o~uno~u °a…ĺo~u a pifo~utiŇč;o~u itiniaj i sa °…ôtipaj a nijaro~u ° ma…ĺa °ajaj ko~u rijar o~urasaka o~uno~u °a…ĺo~u a pifo~utiŇč ko~u sakakaaj.o~u kasasiro~uma no~u rijaran a fo~utiŇč ira ko~u iso~u,saŇč…ĺiŇč…ĺiŇč,ŇčitiwaŇč,sapno~un,matato~usaj,…ĺańßakakaj,timo~u(kakańßo~uŇč),po~uta…¨~…ģ…ônas,o~u…ĺaŇčno~urijar,nasŇčo~u~u ¶…ô, so~u…ĺita ato~u °ao~uwaŇč. itini i Ňčata no~u ¶…ôpo~u ° a nijaro~u ° o~ura ¶awi ° ato~u mako~utaaj i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ tańßira i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan o~u pipo~u…¨~…ģawan. ¶o~uwa ka …¨~…ģifak a ko~uma °…ôn to~u po~u…¨~…ģaw ko~u itiniaj a tam…¨~…ģaw, ano~u ira ko~u °o~usaw nipa…ĺiwa…ĺan tajni i misato~ukajaj, pa ¶aj ¶ipin ńßananaj rańßi…¨~…ģajaj ko~u pipa…ĺiwa…ĺ. mikakańßo~uŇč itini to~u i …ĺi…ĺis no~u rijar a kasanijaro~u ° i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ tańßira i saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan, nikakańßo~uŇčaj, maro~urajaj ko~u taja…ĺ no~u mikakańßo~uŇčaj,ńß…ôr…ôk no~u …ĺafi pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u tamina i rijar misa…ĺafii a misa…ĺi…ĺ,makamanińßar ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mino~ukaj.tańßira to~u i …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar pa ¶akat ńßan ko~u tamina i …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar,mi…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u fafańßijan mi…¨~…ģama a mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ,mipa…¨~…ģaŇč a pasa…¨~…ģak to~u fo~utiŇč.taŇčso~u…ĺan a misa…ĺi…ĺam ko~u nikakańßo~uŇčan no~u mifo~utiŇčaj.o~ura mifo~utiŇčan a kakańßo~uŇč taŇčso~u…ĺ…ôn a mito~uka…¨~…ģ a mia…ĺa ko~u tinai °, sakapańß…ôn a misawsaw ta t…ô…ĺi ńßan i pitapajan masaro~umi °a…¨~…ģ misa…ĺafii a mitapaj (mińßo~u…¨~…ģńßo~u…¨~…ģ). o~u pitapaj to~u kakańßo~uŇč masasiro~umaro~umaaj ko~u ka…ĺo~u…ĺo~uma ° a pitaja…ĺ, o~u ro~uma a …ĺo~uma ° o~u to~u…ĺak no~u t…ôfo~us ko~u sapitapaj,o~u matiniaj a nitapajan ta…¨~…ģafaŇčsisaj, ta…¨~…ģaka °…ôso~u ° a ka…ôn…ôn. o~u ńß…ô ¶i no~u kakańßo~uŇč no~u pasawa…ĺian ko~u °…ôp…ô…¨~…ģaj,ko~u °…ôŇč…ô…ĺaj a ka…ôn…ôn, ¶o~uwa ka ńßitira to~uno~u fo~uto~u…¨~…ģ a kakańßo~uŇč ko~u °sit awa ko~u ka °…ôso~u ° a ka °…ôn…ôn. o~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u pifo~utiŇč o~u kasasiro~umaro~uma a pifo~utiŇč no~u °amis a tam…¨~…ģaw to~usaaj ko~u kasiro~um, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj i o~uno~u rijaran a pifo~utiŇč, o~uro~uma i, o~uno~u °a…ĺo~uan a pifo~utiŇč: rijaran a pifo~utiŇč o~u itiniaj i pasawa…ĺian a nijaro~u ° a tam…¨~…ģaw sańß…ôto~uaj o~u rijar ato~u °a…ĺo~u ko~u pifo~utiŇčan. ano~u irijar a mifo~utiŇč mikari…ĺi ¶aj to~u °ao~u…ĺ a tamina itija ńßo~u,anini sato~u o~uno~u so~uko~u ko~u sapisaŇča ° to~u tamina °. ¶o~uwa ka tata °aŇč ko~uninian a tamina, o~urasak, ¶…ô ¶aj ano~u ¶a to~usa ko~u mika…ĺi ¶aj a tam…¨~…ģaw, itini i Ňčataaj a rijar ko~u pifo~utiŇčan no~u matiniaj, papa ¶…ôm a rata…ĺ a pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja mino~ukaj. o~una sapifo~utiŇč a tamina o~u °ao~u…ĺ ko~u sapisaŇča ° o~u tipaj ano~u ¶a o~u …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujan ńßananaj ko~u nini. o~u paka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaŇčo~ujananaj a pifo~utiŇč ńßananaj ko~unini. o~una tipaj o~u °ao~u…ĺ ira ko~u ** ¶m ko~u ka tata °aŇč * …ĺaja ° ko~u kakaja ° a °ao~u…ĺ ma…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ira ko~u * ko~u °ao~u…ĺ ko~u sapisaŇča °, ńßifa…ĺat…ôn a misi…ĺsi…ĺ ko~u * a °ao~u…ĺ, i fafa °…ô…¨~…ģ no~unini t…ô…ĺi…ôn ko~uja * a kakaja °aj a °ao~u…ĺ, o~u o~uwaj ko~u sapifa…ĺo~u…¨~…ģ a mik…ô…¨~…ģ…ô ¶ pakak…ôtiŇč, isifo~u ° no~u ifafa °…ô…¨~…ģ no~una tipaj pak…ôtiŇč…ôn ko~u tan…ôkt…ôkaj a kamaro~u °an, ńßa…ĺo~ukamaro~u °an no~u mifo~utiŇčaj,i kawanan ato~u i kawi…ĺi ira ko~u sa °iwas, paifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj sa a pa ¶ikaj, ta…ĺo~uriko~ur, pasikawanan, pasikawi…ĺi a mi °iwas,o~u ¶afaj a mifo~utiŇč itira i ka °ajaw no~u tipaj a to~umir…ôŇč a mifo~u…ĺ…ôsak to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ. ira ko~u pinapina a pifo~utiŇčan. *. misa…ĺi…ĺ itiraaj i sakas…ôpat fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ tańßira i saka *,* fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u pifo~utiŇčan.to~uninian fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ awaj ko~u fa…ĺi mara…¨~…ģa ¶aj ko~u rijar, naiko~uran no~u fa…ĺijo~us ko~u °a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u fo~utiŇč.ma…ĺa ¶…ôfaŇčaj ko~u pifo~utiŇč no~unini, mamo~u °…ôt…ôp ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a ¶…ôfaŇč, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ôn no~u °a…ĺo~umanaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u sa…ĺi…ĺ a mi…¨~…ģ…ôfo~uŇč ta…ĺarijar, ma °o~usaw ko~u papinapina a tam…¨~…ģaw i …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar mitato~uj to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ, ¶ifo~utiŇč sato~u i,t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ôn to~u ta…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ. *.mit…ôn…ôŇčaj i Ňčata no~u …ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar o~u fak…ô…ĺo~uńß ko~u sapipato~um…ôn…ôk to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ,mańß…ôr…ôk to~u i,t…ôr…ôŇč…ôn ko~u sa…ĺi…ĺ ta…ĺa…ĺawa ¶ no~u rijar a mipasik…ôt i fo~uk…ô…ĺo~uńß,ma ¶…ô…ĺak to~u ko~u sa…ĺi…ĺ i rijarijaran,ma…ĺ…ôno~u sato~u i, mańßawiki…¨~…ģ no~u rijar ko~u ko~u fo~utiŇč a…ĺakafikafit sa i sa…ĺi…ĺ,mak…ôrańß sato~u i, ta…¨~…ģo~u ńßan to~u a mia…ĺa ko~uni a fo~utiŇč.o~u pinaŇčaŇč no~u matiniaj a pifo~utiŇč i, ka…ĺafian mit…ôŇč…ôn to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ to~u ¶ika a papa ¶…ôm mia…ĺa to~u mikafitaj a fo~utiŇč. == pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģaj ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ==
